cross_scene_arcs.title: Vampire Birth and Initial Struggle
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Claudia is orphaned, transformed into a vampire by Lestat, and begins to rebel against her static existence by cutting her hair and demanding the truth about her transformation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Unconscious human child after being bitten by Louis
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Attacking Lestat and demanding to know who made her a vampire
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her eternal childhood and hatred for her makers

cross_scene_arcs.title: Escalating Hatred and Murder of Lestat
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Claudia's relationship with Lestat deteriorates from initial transformation to confrontation, learning the truth, plotting escape, murdering him, and facing his violent return.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Transformed by Lestat into a vampire
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Fleeing their burning home after Lestat's attack

cross_scene_arcs.title: Evolving Bond with Louis
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Claudia's bond with Louis evolves from seeking help and dependence to hatred after learning the truth, reconciliation, and eventual separation through securing a new caretaker, ending in capture.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Seeking help from Louis as a human child
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Reconciled with Louis but captured by Theatre vampires

cross_scene_arcs.title: Struggle for Independence and Adult Identity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Claudia actively seeks to change her circumstances, from rebelling against doll treatment to urging escape and forcing Louis to create a caretaker so she can leave.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Securing Madeleine as a caretaker to leave Louis
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether she will achieve true independence

cross_scene_arcs.title: Capture and Demise
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After reconciling with Louis, Claudia is captured by the Theatre vampires and later confirmed dead when Louis finds her bloodstained dress.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How she died and the location of her remains

cross_scene_arcs.title: Lestat's Creation of Louis
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Lestat encounters Louis, tests his death wish, secures consent for transformation, turns him into a vampire, and conflicts over hunting humans.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Lestat preying on Louis and questioning his desire for death.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Louis is a vampire but resistant to Lestat's predatory ways.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Louis will accept his vampire nature and hunt humans.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Lestat's Family with Claudia
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Lestat transforms Claudia to form a family with Louis, but Claudia rebels, poisons and kills him, leading to his disfigured return and attack.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Lestat creates Claudia as a daughter.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Lestat is killed by Claudia and returns to attack, set ablaze.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The aftermath of the fire and Lestat's survival.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Lestat's Decline and Rejuvenation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After being killed and burned, Lestat appears scarred at the tribunal, decays in a ruined mansion, and later rejuvenates by killing Malloy.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Dead and wrapped for disposal in the swamp.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Rejuvenated and in control after drinking blood.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Becoming a Vampire
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Louis, grieving his family, becomes a vampire and commits his first murder, leading to moral anguish.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Human plantation owner in deep grief
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: New vampire horrified by his actions
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Conflict between human morality and vampire nature

cross_scene_arcs.title: Family with Lestat and Claudia
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Louis embraces Claudia as a daughter, becomes complicit in Lestat's murder, and later forgives Lestat before leaving him.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Adversarial with Lestat, paternal with Claudia
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Forgives Lestat and departs, emotionally detached

cross_scene_arcs.title: Encounters in Paris
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Louis faces hostility from Santiago, is aided by Armand, destroys the Theatre des Vampires, and parts from Armand to return to solitude.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Invited to vampire theatre by Armand
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Escapes after killing Santiago, later parts from Armand

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Interview
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Louis begins his interview with Malloy, narrates his decision to go to Paris, and ends by attacking Malloy to confront him with vampiric reality.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: What Malloy will do with the recorded story
